originalTitle: How Wall Street pulled off the biggest IPO in history for SpaceX
summary: Bankers convinced investors to believe in a sci-fi strategy, overlook steep losses and hand full control to Elon Musk
content: Bankers convinced investors to believe in a sci-fi strategy, overlook steep losses and hand full control to Elon Musk
chineseTitle: 华尔街如何为 SpaceX 完成历史上最大的 IPO
chineseSummary: 银行家说服投资者相信科幻策略，忽视巨额亏损，并将完全控制权交给埃隆·马斯克
chineseContent: 银行家说服投资者相信科幻策略，忽视巨额亏损，并将完全控制权交给埃隆·马斯克
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
